title: Queen

moves.title: Burn Bright for Me
effects: Apply 1 Strength to all allied creatures

move_pattern: Starts with Puppet Strings, then You're Mine. While the Amalgam is alive: Burn Bright for Me (repeats). After the Amalgam dies: Off with Your Head → Execution → Enrage (repeats).
notes: Queen fights alongside the TorchHeadAmalgam as a companion enemy. The battle has two distinct phases triggered by the Amalgam's death: Phase 1 focuses on crowd control (You're Mine debuffs) and support (Burn Bright for Me buffs allies and defends), while Phase 2 becomes aggressive with consecutive attacks. If the Amalgam dies while Burn Bright for Me is queued, the Queen immediately switches to Enrage instead. The amounts 99 for Frail/Weak/Vulnerable are likely capped stack effects.
